description:
Traffic congestion estimations of the road network of the wider urban area of Thessaloniki (Greece) produced using Floating Car Data (FCD).

Congestion is classified as low, medium, or high.

Εκτιμήσεις τρεχουσών κυκλοφοριακών συνθηκών στο οδικό δίκτυο της ευρύτερης αστικής περιοχής της Θεσσαλονίκης (Ελλάδα) χρησιμοποιώντας δεδομένα από οχήματα εν κινήσει (FCD).

Το επίπεδο συμφόρησης κατηγοριοποιείται σε: χαμηλό, μέτριο ή υψηλό.
name: nap-rdf-traffic-congestion-of-the-road-network-of-thessaloniki

resources.description:
An HTTP call to this resource returns only the first 500 available records, since paging is performed with a default setting of 500 records.

To get the next 500 records, please append the following string in your GET request: ?offset=500&limit=500

For the next 500 records, append accordingly: ?offset=1000&limit=500

Similarly, for more records.

Available fields include: "Link_id", "Link_Direction", "Timestamp", and "Congestion".

It should be noted that the values of the "Link_id" field are compatible with OSM objects.
resources.name: traffic-congestion-real-time-xml
resources.title: Traffic Congestion (Real-time / XML)
